## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion to finalize details for The Adventures Group's engagement with GrowthX for content creation and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will provide comprehensive content creation, SEO, and analytics services, with access to GA and Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Scope adjusted to include Spanish translation/localization, reducing English content volume by half](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Kickoff planned for week of Dec 16th, with full content production starting in January](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Technical integrations (Sanity CMS, image management) are manageable; GrowthX team is confident in execution](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation and Analytics Workflow

  - [Moving away from AirOps to custom workflows for 10M+ words/month](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [GrowthX will handle all aspects: editing, strategy, reporting, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Weekly reports from GA and Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Potential for future automation of reporting and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

### Multilingual Content Strategy

  - [Content must be published in both English and Spanish simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Spanish-speaking editor (Mariana) for review and localization](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Adjusted scope: Reduce English content volume by half, add Spanish translation](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Client base: 87-90% English speakers, 10-12% Spanish speakers](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

### Technical Integrations

  - [Sanity CMS integration is feasible; GrowthX experienced with headless CMSs](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [Image management: Current storage in Dropbox (1000+ images)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Potential use of Sanity's CDN for programmatic image handling](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Possibility of custom photo assignments for unique content](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

### Future Expansions and Add-ons

  - [Potential for newsletter integration with HubSpot (not in initial scope)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Additional CRO and campaign strategies possible after 3-month mark](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [GrowthX open to guiding or potentially executing additional projects](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)

### Project Kickoff and Timeline

  - [Proposed start date: December 16th](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Intensive kickoff week: 1-hour kickoff, 1-2 hour deep dive sessions](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [3 weeks for strategy development and calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Full content production to begin first week of January](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to edit SOW to reflect reduced English content and added Spanish translation](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Isabella to join Slack Connect for improved communication](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Isabella to obtain final approval from management by Friday/Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [GrowthX EA to coordinate kickoff scheduling once approval is received](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Team to prepare for intensive kickoff week (Dec 16th) and strategy development period](https://fathom.video/share/6ZTFsxpU76R4K6sxdkR_yXn9cgG9yutU?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
